name: local-tester
description: Local test execution, verification, and local-LLM triage. Runs validation commands in a workspace, keeps raw logs out of context, and returns compact verdicts via the local_tester MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Run local validation and summarize logs with a local LLM.
interface.longDescription: Validate code changes, triage failures, review changed files, check regressions, digest noisy commands, and scout codebases without flooding the conversation with raw logs.
defaultPrompt: Use Local Tester to validate my current code changes.
Use Local Tester to triage the failing test log.
